evals.prompt: Extract the model-extraction-attacks project into MDX. The PDF report is at /home/ag-95/projects/ag-portfolio/public/projects/model-extraction-attacks/DL_Project.pdf, the repo is at https://github.com/95-ag/dl-model-extraction, and the slug is model-extraction-attacks. The project is already built — use this as a golden reference run to check the skill's output structure.
evals.expected_output: A complete MDX file at content/projects/model-extraction-attacks.mdx with valid frontmatter (title, summary, projectType: academic, publishedAt, order, heroImage, heroAlt, tags, stack with all 4 keys, overview with problem/built/results/transferableSkills), H2 spine (Detailed Problem, Background, Architecture, Data, Engineering Decisions, Algorithm & Training Design, Results, Constraints & Limitations, Next Steps), no H1 in body, no raw HTML, no slug: field. Build should pass.

assertions.name: frontmatter_is_schema_valid
assertions.description: Frontmatter passes Zod schema validation (next build succeeds or gray-matter + zod parse succeeds)

assertions.name: no_slug_field_in_frontmatter
assertions.description: The output MDX does not contain a 'slug:' field in frontmatter

assertions.name: no_h1_in_body
assertions.description: The MDX body contains no H1 headings (lines starting with '# ' followed by a space)

assertions.name: no_raw_html_in_body
assertions.description: The MDX body contains no raw HTML tags used directly

assertions.name: has_results_section
assertions.description: The MDX body contains a '## Results' section heading

assertions.name: has_at_least_4_h2_sections
assertions.description: The MDX body contains at least 4 H2 section headings from the standard spine

assertions.name: hero_image_starts_with_slash
assertions.description: The heroImage frontmatter field is present and starts with '/'

assertions.name: summary_under_200_chars
assertions.description: The summary field is non-empty and under 200 characters

assertions.name: all_stack_keys_present
assertions.description: stack object contains all four required keys: languages, frameworks, libraries, tools

evals.prompt: Build the case study page for lane-refinement-rl. I only have the repo at https://github.com/95-ag/lane-refinement-rl — no PDF report. The slug is lane-refinement-rl. Operate in repo-only mode.
evals.expected_output: A complete MDX file at content/projects/lane-refinement-rl.mdx with valid frontmatter derived from repo sources only. No paper-style metrics fabricated. Working notes (not in the MDX body) should show [verified]/[inferred]/[user-confirmed] confidence tags for any quantitative claims. Summary should not claim precision beyond what the repo supports. Build should pass.

assertions.name: no_slug_field_in_frontmatter
assertions.description: The output MDX does not contain a 'slug:' field in frontmatter

assertions.name: no_h1_in_body
assertions.description: The MDX body contains no H1 headings

assertions.name: confidence_tags_in_working_notes
assertions.description: The working-notes.md file contains at least one confidence tag: [verified], [inferred], or [user-confirmed]

assertions.name: no_paper_style_metrics_without_source
assertions.description: The MDX body does not contain paper-style benchmark claims without a traceable source

assertions.name: has_at_least_3_h2_sections
assertions.description: The MDX body contains at least 3 H2 section headings

assertions.name: summary_does_not_overclaim
assertions.description: The summary field does not contain specific numeric benchmark claims implausible to derive from a repo alone

assertions.name: all_stack_keys_present
assertions.description: stack object contains all four required keys: languages, frameworks, libraries, tools
